expectations.evidence: Explicitly shows 'uv run paper-tool add https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.12345'

expectations.text: Mentions at least one flag (--debug, --stream, or --force)

expectations.evidence: Lists 5-step pipeline: PDF下载, 文本提取, 图表渲染, LLM分析, 写入Notion

expectations.text: Response is actionable with copy-pasteable command
